description: This file defines API routes related to invitation management in the backend of a user management system. It includes endpoints for creating, revoking, and accepting invitations, utilizing FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and custom business logic services.

methods.name: InvitationResponse create_invitation( req: Request, payload: InvitationCreateRequest, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Handles POST requests to create a new invitation, generating a token and logging the action.

methods.name: InvitationResponse revoke_invitation( req: Request, invitation_id: uuid.UUID, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Handles POST requests to revoke an existing invitation, marking it as invalid and logging the action.

methods.name: TokenResponse accept_invitation( req: Request, payload: SignupRequest, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Handles POST requests to accept an invitation, create a user, generate a JWT token, and log the event.

ctags.name: accept_invitation
ctags.signature: ( req: Request, payload: SignupRequest, db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )

ctags.name: create_invitation
ctags.signature: ( req: Request, payload: InvitationCreateRequest, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )

ctags.name: revoke_invitation
ctags.signature: ( req: Request, invitation_id: uuid.UUID, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
